name: Pocket Car City!
author: Poki
description: Pocket Car City is a wild driving game where the whole city is your playground! Cruise the streets, explore freely, or jump into thrilling races to earn money. Soar off ramps, smash through obstacles like trees (or even unlucky pedestrians), and collect stars to rack up coins for better cars. Want to explore, crash, and race all in one? How to play Pocket Car City! Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Brake or reverse: S or the down arrow key Turn: A/D or left and right arrow keys Who created Pocket Car City! Pocket Car City! is created by Nineties Games. Play their other games on Poki: Slime Journey >! How can I play Pocket Car City! for free? You can play Pocket Car City! for free on Poki. Can I play Pocket Car City! on mobile devices and desktop? Pocket Car City! can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
